hero.title: Say it once, share it forever
hero.subtitle: Record with the mic or dictate with Wispr Flow. Style and share with love.
hero.quote: "Hold onto memories; they will hold onto you."

sharedCta: ✨ You received a Wibe Story! Tap Create my card to make your own.

record.label: Your voice
record.paused: Paused — tap the mic to resume

speechLang.title: Select speech language
speechLang.reminderEmpty: Select a language for speech detection
speechLang.reminderNative: Unsupported languages are treated as the native language
speechLang.subNoLang: Select a language to enable the mic
speechLang.subNative: Choose a different language to speak
speechLang.tooltipNoLang: Select a language to enable the mic
speechLang.tooltipNative: Mic is currently disabled for native language

nameRow.label: From
nameRow.placeholder: e.g. Mom, Durga, Taylor, Sensei, Abuela, Pi Lisa, Ella...

fontSize.label: Font size
fontSize.info: Available only when your card text is under 85 characters
fontSize.infoOn: Your card text is short: tap + or − to adjust the size

rewrite.exhausted: 0 {tone} rewrites left today. Try another tone

cardEmpty:
Fill the details,
your card appears here
cardPlaceholder: Your story appears here as you speak or type.

wcta.text: Use your voice anywhere you type: WhatsApp, Gmail, Slack, any app.

footer.independent: Independent project · Not affiliated with Wispr Flow

shareModal.title: Share your card
shareModal.sub: Post the image directly, or share the app link so others can make their own cards.

upgradeModal.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgradeModal.sub: Unlimited tone rewrites. No more daily limits.
upgradeModal.disclaimer: Wibe Stories — made for Wispr Flow

capacity.title: We're overwhelmed with love!
capacity.text: Thank you for the incredible response. We've reached our daily capacity and need to give our servers a little rest.
capacity.reset: We'll be back at midnight UTC.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Wibe Stories
onboarding.step1: Speak or type your message. Tap the microphone or paste text.
onboarding.step2: Customize your card: choose a tone, color, and corner style.
onboarding.step3: Create & share: download as PNG or share directly on social platforms.
onboarding.hint: Need help later? Open How to Use in the footer menu.

toasts.updateAvailable: A new version is ready — tap to refresh.
